# CineSmithPro

> AI editing companion for Adobe Premiere Pro 25.6+, built specifically for film, documentary, drama, and podcast editors. Native UXP plugin (not legacy CEP). Waitlist open; closed beta opens summer 2026.

CineSmithPro is a vertical-premium Premiere Pro plugin from CineArt AI Limited (London). It is a companion product to CineSmith (cinesmith.io) — same company, separate brand expression — that ports CineSmith's audio orchestration and LLM adapter pattern as fresh TypeScript for editors who work directly in Premiere rather than in a separate web app.

The cohort is editors the existing "AI for Premiere" tools cannot reach: film, documentary, drama, and podcast editors who already use Trint, Otter, Descript, or Rev — not the creator-economy YouTube editor.

## Pages

- [Home](https://cinesmithpro.com/): features, audience, roadmap, pricing, waitlist

## Capabilities at launch (MVP)

- **Story Cutter** — accepts Trint, Otter, Descript, Rev, SRT, VTT and Premiere native `.json` transcripts. Beat extraction, paper-edit review, rough-cut insertion at the playhead. Multicam aware (stacked V1/V2/V3).
- **Color Grade Assistant** — frame-at-playhead capture, 0–100 technical score, one-click "Apply Recommended Look" writes to Lumetri. Custom .cube LUT generation. Skin-tone protection.
- **Voiceover at Playhead** — AI voiceover generation directly into the Premiere timeline at the cursor. Ported from CineSmith — competitor ChatVideoPro has no audio integrations at all.
- **Image & Thumbnail Generation** — multi-model (Flux 2 Max, Nano Banana Pro, GPT Image 2, Seedream, Grok Imagine). Live cost preview. Canvas editor.

## Roadmap

- **Jun 2026** — Closed alpha with first cohort of working editors on doc + drama briefs
- **Jul 2026** — Generative B-Roll (Sora 2, Veo 3.1, Kling, Hailuo, WAN, Seedance)
- **Sep 2026** — SAM 3 Rotoscope ships with Hybrid Plugin (.uxpaddon) for FFmpeg + ProRes 4444
- **Oct 2026** — Studio Tier: sovereign model hosting + SSO + per-seat billing
- **Dec 2026** — After Effects parity

## Pricing

- Creator licence (one-time): from $99, up to $249 across tiers. Solo licence, 2 concurrent sessions, BYO Fal.ai key, generation cost is pass-through.
- Studio tier: $200 per seat per month. Managed sovereign model hosting, SSO, single invoice — for editorial teams who cannot run individual Fal.ai accounts.

## Why this exists

The existing AI plugin in this space (ChatVideoPro) is built on Adobe's CEP runtime, which Adobe is removing by November 2026. CineSmithPro is UXP-native from day one. The competitor also accepts only Premiere's native `.json` transcript format — locking out editors who use Trint, Otter, Descript, or Rev (i.e., most working documentary and drama editors). It has zero audio integrations. CineSmithPro is the UXP-native, transcript-flexible, audio-capable alternative.

## Compatibility

- Adobe Premiere Pro 25.6 or newer (UXP runtime required — not CEP)
- macOS and Windows
- Distribution: self-hosted `.ccx` direct from cinesmithpro.com
